testcase.name: test_register_citizen

failure.message: requests.exceptions.MissingSchema: Invalid URL '/api/auth/register': No scheme supplied. Perhaps you meant https:///api/auth/register?

testcase.failure: tests/test_urban_intel_api.py:9: in test_register_citizen r = api.post(f"{base_url}/api/auth/register", /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:712: in post return self.request("POST", url, data=data, json=json, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:635: in request prep = self.prepare_request(req) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:541: in prepare_request p.prepare( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:439: in prepare self.prepare_url(url, params) /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:514: in prepare_url raise MissingSchema( E requests.exceptions.MissingSchema: Invalid URL '/api/auth/register': No scheme supplied. Perhaps you meant https:///api/auth/register?

testcase.name: test_incident_404

error.message: failed on setup with "requests.exceptions.MissingSchema: Invalid URL '/api/auth/login': No scheme supplied. Perhaps you meant https:///api/auth/login?"

testcase.error: tests/conftest.py:36: in admin_auth return _login(api, "admin@urbanintel.app", "Admin@123") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/conftest.py:24: in _login r = api.post(f"{BASE_URL}/api/auth/login", json={"email": email, "password": password}) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:712: in post return self.request("POST", url, data=data, json=json, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:635: in request prep = self.prepare_request(req) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:541: in prepare_request p.prepare( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:439: in prepare self.prepare_url(url, params) /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:514: in prepare_url raise MissingSchema( E requests.exceptions.MissingSchema: Invalid URL '/api/auth/login': No scheme supplied. Perhaps you meant https:///api/auth/login?

testcase.name: test_admin_analytics

Perhaps you meant https:///api/auth/login?

testcase.name: test_citizen_cannot_access_analytics

error.message: failed on setup with "requests.exceptions.MissingSchema: Invalid URL '/api/auth/login': No scheme supplied. Perhaps you meant https:///api/auth/login?"

testcase.error: tests/conftest.py:31: in citizen_auth return _login(api, "citizen@urbanintel.app", "Citizen@123") ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ tests/conftest.py:24: in _login r = api.post(f"{BASE_URL}/api/auth/login", json={"email": email, "password": password}) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:712: in post return self.request("POST", url, data=data, json=json, **kwargs) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:635: in request prep = self.prepare_request(req) ^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^^ /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/sessions.py:541: in prepare_request p.prepare( /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:439: in prepare self.prepare_url(url, params) /root/.venv/lib/python3.11/site-packages/requests/models.py:514: in prepare_url raise MissingSchema( E requests.exceptions.MissingSchema: Invalid URL '/api/auth/login': No scheme supplied. Perhaps you meant https:///api/auth/login?
